metadata.explanation: This JavaScript code sets the `document.title` property to 'Todo App'. While the task description explicitly mentions updating `index.html`, the `TARGET_PATH` specified is `frontend/index.js`. In a typical React application scaffolded with Vite, the static title of the HTML document is defined within `frontend/index.html`. Modifying `document.title` in a JavaScript file (like `frontend/index.js` if it were an entry point or imported) would dynamically change the browser tab's title after the script executes, rather than modifying the static HTML file itself. This code provides the most direct way to achieve the desired title change from a JavaScript file.
